title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that coding alone no longer differentiates junior cloud engineers. The video advocates that juniors should understand fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, performance, and maintainability while using AI agents to accelerate work, with emphasis on knowing what to build and why rather than implementation details.
